title: Byzantine Styles Pack for Minecolonies
description: This mod adds building styles for Minecolonies
body:
This mod adds building styles for Minecolonies
**Also adds the Shogun and Nile styles**
*You must have Minecolonies for 1.20+ and dependencies (Domum Ornamentum, Structurize, Multi-piston, Block-UI)*

Runs on 1.20 and 1.21 minecraft versions wherever minecolonies runs



If you have any issues or questions about this style, or to find a building guide...
Join Byzantine style discord

https://discord.gg/4C3f3aVaQP


Plug into mods folder and play, no moving blueprints necessary
Check from time to time for updates



https://www.patreon.com/c/Spumantii


Check out Sjin's playthroughs!!
